title: orchis × intermedia
intro: Orchis × intermedia, also known as the intermediate spur orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant resulting from the cross-pollination of two different orchid species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orchis × intermedia include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health and lower blood pressure. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
